sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt64, event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, addDate(toDate('2020-01-01'), INTERVAL 10 DAY));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = addDate(event_date, INTERVAL 2 MONTH) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, addDate(event_date, INTERVAL 5 YEAR) AS updated_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT addDate(toDate('2022-06-15'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS next_year_date;
